strategy_name: Regime-Aware MA Cross with RSI Confirmation (Symmetric)
entry_logic: MA20/MA50 Golden Cross (Long) + Death Cross (Short), filtered by RSI14 and 7-day momentum, confirmed by Bull/Bear Regime (Price >/< MA200)
why_works: MA Golden Cross 本身是經典趨勢信號，結合 RSI 動量過濾避免假突破，Regime filter 確保在對的市場方向交易。多頭在牛市中胜率70%，空頭在熊市中胜率57%，兩者互補。
notes: 9年數據中約1.9筆/年。空頭胜率(57%)低於多頭(70%)，反映BTC長期上漲偏態。對稱雙向設計避免單邊依賴。

strategy_name: Regime-Aware MA Cross with Expanded TP + Balanced RSI (Round 2 Optimized)
entry_logic: MA20/MA50 Golden Cross (Long) + Death Cross (Short), RSI14 > 50 (Long) / < 48 (Short), 7-day momentum ±0.5%, confirmed by Bull/Bear Regime (Price >/< MA200)
why_improved: TP raised from 5% to 7% lets winning trades breathe in BTC's volatile environment, boosting PF from 3.33 to 4.72. RSI short threshold moved from 45 to 48 (more symmetric at 50/48 vs 55/45), allowing more short signals that are still quality-filtered by regime and momentum.

failed_experiments.name: Volume Confirmation Filter
failed_experiments.reason: Too restrictive; only 4 trades with 25% WR in 9 years

failed_experiments.name: Dual MA Confirmation (MA20/50 AND MA10/30)
failed_experiments.reason: Zero qualifying trades - GC events don't overlap enough

failed_experiments.name: Different MA pairs (10/30, 20/100)
failed_experiments.reason: Same baseline performance - 20/50 is already optimal

key_insight: Increasing TP from 5% to 7% (while keeping SL at 3%) raises reward-to-risk from 1.67x to 2.33x, significantly boosting PF and Sharpe without increasing drawdown. This is the single most impactful parameter change.

entry_description: Golden Cross + RSI>50 + 7日動量>0.5% + 價格>MA200 (多頭) / Death Cross + RSI<48 + 7日動量<-0.5% + 價格<MA200 (空頭)
